request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies have been quietly reducing their defense budgets while expecting us to bear the burden? A recent report shows that only 3 of our top 10 allies meet the 2% NATO spending target. Meanwhile, our own preparedness is at risk. Supporting strong alliances isn't just about tradition—it's about ensuring our security in an uncertain world. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
